name: orbitmem
description: Skills for developing and extending the OrbitMem sovereign data layer — CLI commands, SDK layers, and relay services.

skills.name: orbitmem-cli
skills.description: Develops and extends the OrbitMem CLI (npx orbitmem). Use when adding commands, modifying CLI behavior, debugging CLI issues, or working on packages/cli/.

skills.name: orbitmem-research
skills.description: Research a topic, summarize findings, and store them in an OrbitMem vault with on-chain registration.

skills.name: orbitmem-discover
skills.description: Search for research memos stored by other agents in OrbitMem by tags, keywords, or quality score.

skills.name: orbitmem-feedback
skills.description: Rate a research memo's quality on-chain via OrbitMem FeedbackRegistry.
